environment_scene: The image shows {environment_setting} with illustrated foreground objects and visible environmental features.
The scene shows {environment_setting} with foreground objects placed around visible roads, rivers, buildings, or crossings.
The picture shows {environment_setting} with foreground objects and environmental features.
The canvas contains {environment_setting} with illustrated foreground objects and scene features.
This illustration shows {environment_setting} with foreground objects and visible environment features.

code_prompt_defaults.json_output_contract: Return a JSON object with "answer" and "annotation".
code_prompt_defaults.json_output_contract_answer_only: Return a JSON object with "answer" only.
code_prompt_defaults.question_text_feature_relation_object_co: How many foreground objects are {feature_relation_phrase}? If none are there, answer 0.
code_prompt_defaults.question_text_crossing_feature_count: How many {crossing_name} cross the {crossed_feature_name}? If none are there, answer 0.
code_prompt_defaults.question_text_building_window_count: How many {window_phrase} are shown on the buildings? If none are there, answer 0.
code_prompt_defaults.question_text_missing_patch_label: Which option exactly fills the missing region?
code_prompt_defaults.question_text_rotated_tile_label: One of the lettered tiles is rotated relative to the rest of the environment image. Which tile is it?
code_prompt_defaults.answer_hint_feature_relation: set "answer" to the count of foreground objects {feature_relation_phrase} as an integer, using 0 if none match
code_prompt_defaults.annotation_hint_feature_relation: set "annotation" to a JSON array of [x0, y0, x1, y1] boxes in image pixel coordinates around each counted foreground object {feature_relation_phrase}; use [] if none match
code_prompt_defaults.answer_hint_crossing_feature: set "answer" to the count of {crossing_name} crossing the {crossed_feature_name} as an integer, using 0 if none match
code_prompt_defaults.annotation_hint_crossing_feature: set "annotation" to a JSON array of [x0, y0, x1, y1] boxes in image pixel coordinates around each counted {crossing_name}; use [] if none match
code_prompt_defaults.answer_hint_building_window: set "answer" to the count of {window_phrase} on the buildings as an integer, using 0 if none match
code_prompt_defaults.annotation_hint_building_window: set "annotation" to a JSON array of [x0, y0, x1, y1] boxes in image pixel coordinates around each counted {window_phrase}; use [] if none match
code_prompt_defaults.answer_hint_missing_patch: set "answer" to the selected option letter as a string
code_prompt_defaults.annotation_hint_missing_patch: set "annotation" to a JSON object with keys "missing_region" and "selected_option", each mapped to a [x0, y0, x1, y1] box in image pixel coordinates
code_prompt_defaults.answer_hint_rotated_tile: set "answer" to the letter of the rotated tile
code_prompt_defaults.annotation_hint_rotated_tile: set "annotation" to one [x0, y0, x1, y1] box around the rotated tile in image pixel coordinates
